criteria.excellent: Vivid, specific context with key details
Clear personal role and responsibility defined
criteria.good: Role is mentioned but not detailed
criteria.needs_work: Unclear what the candidate's role was

criteria.excellent: Multiple specific actions with rationale for each decision
Quantified impact with metrics and learnings
Clarifies requirements, identifies edge cases, states assumptions
criteria.good: Understands problem, mentions some edge cases

criteria.excellent: Optimal algorithm with clear reasoning for choice
criteria.good: Correct algorithm, could be more optimal
criteria.needs_work: Brute force or partially correct approach

criteria.excellent: Clean, readable code with good variable names and structure
criteria.good: Working code with minor style issues
criteria.needs_work: Code works but is messy or hard to follow

criteria.excellent: Correct time and space complexity with optimization discussion

system_design.description: Evaluation rubric for system design questions

criteria.excellent: Clarifies functional/non-functional requirements, estimates scale
Clear component diagram with data flow and API design
criteria.good: Main components identified with basic interactions

criteria.excellent: Explores multiple options with reasoned trade-offs for each decision
criteria.good: Makes reasonable choices with some justification

criteria.excellent: Addresses scaling, failure modes, monitoring, and bottlenecks
criteria.good: Mentions scaling and basic failure handling
criteria.needs_work: Brief mention of scale without detail
criteria.poor: No consideration of scale or reliability

sql_data.description: Evaluation rubric for SQL and data questions

criteria.excellent: Correct query handling all edge cases
Discusses indexing, query plans, and performance
Understands schema design, normalization, and relationships
Explains approach clearly, discusses alternatives
Deep understanding with mathematical intuition
Real-world examples with implementation details
Discusses multiple approaches with reasoned trade-offs
Discusses deployment, monitoring, and maintenance
